narrative: Middle East escalation and the failed US-Iran peace deal drive a geopolitical risk premium as crude surges toward $100—USD/JPY firms to 157.11 on a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage despite the supply shock. Gold lower -1.35% near $4,667; equities +0.84%; DXY +0.26%; VIX 17.2. Fed 3.75% vs ECB 2.0% (+175bp) anchors EUR/USD at 1.1755. Watch RBNZ meeting May 27 for the next G8 policy catalyst.
